message:
🌱 helm: Proposal: helm commandeer (#1027)

* 🌱 Add helm: Proposal: helm commandeer mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: change helm#2730 status from completed to proposed — proposal never implemented

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "helm-2730-proposal-helm-commandeer",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "helm: Proposal: helm commandeer",
+    "description": "Proposal: helm commandeer. Requested by 61+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "proposed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current helm setup",
+        "description": "Verify your helm version and configuration:\n```bash\nhelm version --short\n```\nThis feature requires a working helm installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review helm configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant helm configuration:\nMany users want to be able to \"adopt\" currently running pods, services, etc. into a new or existing chart."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Proposal: helm commandeer",
+        "description": "First off, I think this is a great feature, and I personally love the name \"commandeer\" (though maybe \"adopt\" is a little more consistent and easier for people like me to spell).\n\nI am duty bound to ask the question I am notorious for: _Should this be a plugin?_ \ud83d\ude04 \n\nOkay, with that out of the\n```yaml\n$ helm commandeer --name=myNewChart deployment:www-frontend service:www-gateway configmap:www-config\nGenerated chart myNewChart\nAdded Deployment www-frontend\nAdded Service www-gateway\nAdded ConfigMap www-config\nChart myNewChart is released as myNewChart.v1\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade helm to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade helm:\n```bash\n# Check current version\nhelm version --short\n# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/helm/helm\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Proposal: helm commandeer\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "First off, I think this is a great feature, and I personally love the name \"commandeer\" (though maybe \"adopt\" is a little more consistent and easier for people like me to spell).\n\nI am duty bound to ask the question I am notorious for: _Should this be a plugin?_ \ud83d\ude04 \n\nOkay, with that out of the way....\n\nHere's a different way we _could_ approach the same issue.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ helm commandeer --name=myNewChart deployment:www-frontend service:www-gateway configmap:www-config\nGenerated chart myNewChart\nAdded Deployment www-frontend\nAdded Service www-gateway\nAdded ConfigMap www-config\nChart myNewChart is released as myNewChart.v1"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
